description_long: This is a medium-sized woven handbag featuring a gradient of blue tones, transitioning from a light blue at the base to a deeper blue at the center, and topped with a cream-colored upper section and handles. The bag has a wide, open top and a spacious interior, making it suitable for carrying personal items or shopping goods. The woven texture is prominent, giving the bag a handcrafted, artisanal appearance. Two sturdy, cream-colored handles are attached symmetrically, allowing for comfortable hand or shoulder carrying. The bag's structure is semi-rigid, maintaining its shape while still being flexible. No visible logos, hardware, or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a simple and functional design.
description: A woven handbag with a blue gradient body and cream handles, featuring a spacious open top and a handcrafted texture. The design is simple, functional, and free of visible logos or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full gradient from light blue at the base to deep blue in the middle, with cream handles and upper edge clearly visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the oval opening and the alignment of the two cream handles, with the blue gradient visible along the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the blue gradient and cream upper section, with the woven texture prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite top-down view, again showing the oval opening and handle placement, with the gradient visible along the side.
attribute_strap_type: Two medium-length, fixed, non-adjustable handles made of cream woven material, suitable for hand or shoulder carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Open top with no visible closure mechanism.
attribute_pattern: Gradient color pattern with woven texture, transitioning from light blue at the base to deep blue in the middle, and cream at the top.
